---
title: "Contact"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-item}
[{{< fa envelope >}}]{.contact-icon}
**Email**
[guritheochem@gmail.com](mailto:guritheochem@gmail.com)
:::

::: {.contact-item}
[{{< fa envelope >}}]{.contact-icon}
**Email**
[gurjot.singh@hu-berlin.de](mailto:gurjot.singh@hu-berlin.de)
:::

:::

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-item}
[{{< fa brands github >}}]{.contact-icon}
**GitHub**
[GuriTheoChem](https://github.com/GuriTheoChem){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.contact-item}
[{{< fa brands gitlab >}}]{.contact-icon}
**GitLab**
[guri_theo_chem](https://gitlab.com/guri_theo_chem){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.contact-item}
[{{< fa brands google-scholar >}}]{.contact-icon}
**Google Scholar**
[Gurjot Singh](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=7_TIJlgAAAAJ){target="_blank"}
:::

:::
